aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical areas for improvement. The website includes essential information but lacks depth in content and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Add more detailed content about each service offered to improve keyword relevance and depth.
Incorporate customer testimonials or reviews to build trust and provide fresh content.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords related to services and location.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) link, but there are no reviews and the rating is not displayed.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is underutilized, with no reviews or engagement, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: No customer reviews or engagement on GBP.
Inconsistent display of GBP information on the website.
Lack of regular updates or posts on the GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on the website, but there is no evidence of widespread citations across directories.
action_items: Verify and claim listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Actively manage and update citations to improve local search presence.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for the business.
Missing Service schema for each specific service offered.
No Review schema to highlight customer testimonials or reviews.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of rich, detailed content and user engagement features.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed service information or customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding customer testimonials and detailed service descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing informative blog posts and engaging with the community through content.
